title: Work Forms - Paste Images with CTRL+C Field
excerpt:
When I use the field “updates” on my workforms it could have rich text options, with the possibility to simply paste images with CTRL+V. 
This would be a game change for my company :slight_smile:

posts.author: Flaviomian (Flavio Mian)
posts.cookedHtml:
When I use the field “updates” on my workforms it could have rich text options, with the possibility to simply paste images with CTRL+V.

posts.author: UFAI (Adam)
posts.cookedHtml:
I absolutely agree.
It’s annoying when I take a screenshot to first have to save it somewhere, then find it when clicking upload files.
A quick CTRL+V would be awesome!
